mdRecord.dcterms:title: James C. Biddle to Gertrude G. Meredith, February 28, 1862
mdRecord.dcterms:description: First Lieutenant James C. Biddle writes to Gertrude G. Meredith from Fort Hatteras, North Carolina, discussing military news, thoughts about family, weather, and future movements of his own command.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-1865
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Biddle, James C.
